pulses.emptyHistory: No SMS sent yet. SMS can be sent from other plugins when Pulse is configured.

pulses.appleMessagesDescription: Sends SMS via your iPhone's carrier using the Mac's Messages app. Requires your iPhone to be on the same Apple ID as this Mac with Text Message Forwarding enabled (iPhone Settings → Messages → Text Message Forwarding). Messages are sent as regular SMS to any phone number — not as iMessage.
pulses.twilioHint: Get Account SID, Auth Token and a phone number from
pulses.mockDescription: Mock does not send real SMS; it only logs. Use for testing.
pulses.testHint: Send a test SMS using the fields above (no need to save first).
